# Emre Öcel — Personal Portfolio

> Computer Engineer & Full Stack Web Developer based in Turkey.
> Fırat University Computer Engineering graduate working at Webioo Digital Agency.
> Specializes in modern web development, e-commerce solutions, and interactive web experiences.

## About

Emre Öcel is a computer engineer and web developer who builds performant, accessible, and visually impressive web experiences. He works at Webioo Digital Agency (https://www.webioo.com.tr/), developing web design and e-commerce solutions for clients across Turkey.

**Key expertise:**
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Vue.js, Three.js
- Backend: PHP, Node.js, MySQL, MongoDB, REST API, .NET
- Application: Java, C#, C++, C, Python

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://emreocell.github.io/) — Portfolio overview with interactive 3D scene, projects, skills, and contact form
- [Blog](https://emreocell.github.io/blog/) — Articles about web development, technology, and software engineering
- [About Section](https://emreocell.github.io/#about) — Background, education, work experience
- [Projects Section](https://emreocell.github.io/#projects) — GitHub projects, client work, university thesis
- [Skills Section](https://emreocell.github.io/#skills) — Technical skills across frontend, backend, and application development
- [Contact Section](https://emreocell.github.io/#contact) — Contact form and social links

## Blog Posts

- [Modern Kurumsal Web Projelerinde Doğru Teknoloji Seçimi](https://emreocell.github.io/blog/kurumsal-web-projelerinde-teknoloji-secimi/) — Tech stack selection for corporate web projects: frameworks, databases, server architecture
- [2025'te Başarılı Bir Web Sitesi İçin Olmazsa Olmaz 7 Teknik Kriter](https://emreocell.github.io/blog/basarili-web-sitesi-teknik-kriterler/) — Technical criteria for modern websites: Core Web Vitals, SEO, accessibility, security
- [KOBİ'ler İçin E-Ticaret Rehberi](https://emreocell.github.io/blog/kobiler-icin-e-ticaret-rehberi/) — E-commerce platform selection, payment integration, SEO, and growth strategies for SMEs

## Professional Context

- **Employer:** Webioo Digital Agency (https://www.webioo.com.tr/)
- **Services:** Web design (https://www.webioo.com.tr/web-tasarim), E-commerce (https://www.webioo.com.tr/e-ticaret)
- **Education:** Fırat University — Computer Engineering (B.Sc.)
- **Location:** Turkey
- **Languages:** Turkish (native), English (professional)

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/emreocell
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/emreocel
- Email: emreocell1219@gmail.com

## Technical Details

This site is built with:
- Jekyll (static site generator) hosted on GitHub Pages
- Three.js for 3D graphics and particle effects
- GSAP + ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven animations
- i18next for TR/EN language switching
- CSS custom properties for dark/light theme toggle
- FormSubmit for serverless contact form

The site is fully static with no server-side processing. All content is available in both Turkish and English.
